extortion.description: Dona FormosaSince our founding in 1999, we have dedicated our expertise to the manufacturing of dairy products and the distribution of partner brands. Our journey, which began more than two decades ago, continues to be marked by an unwavering commitment to excellence.Our dedication to quality is recognized by renowned chefs who choose our products for their dishes in restaurants, buffets and industrial kitchens. In addition, we are trusted by hundreds of points of sale, including large supermarket chains. In this way, we offer top-quality products to a wide range of audiences, consolidating our position as a reference in the market.Located in Águas Formosas, our industry is the beating heart where each Dona Formosa product is carefully crafted. In addition, our Distribution Center (DC) in Belo Horizonte ensures efficient and agile delivery, connecting our exceptional products to homes and commercial establishments throughout the state of Minas Gerais.At Dona Formosa, our trajectory is more than a success story, it is a constant commitment to quality, tradition and customer satisfaction.We are proud to be a brand that continues to grow and evolve, always bringing the best in dairy products to you and your family.Welcome to the tasty world of Dona FormosaGeo: Brazil - Leak size: 4 GB Archive - Contains: Files
